calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Fong in Propria Persona.

The Court questioned urgency. Mr. Fong stated that even though they were married in China, it will be easier in future years and for future generations to obtain documents in California versus China. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
